description_long: This is a rectangular, hard-sided toolbox with a matte black finish and a rugged, utilitarian appearance. The lid features a prominent white circular marking with a red cross, suggesting a medical or emergency use. The front side is equipped with a wide, brown leather handle secured by two metal brackets, and the lid is fastened with two visible metal latches. The box appears to be constructed primarily from metal, with leather and metal hardware for the handle and latches. The surface shows subtle wear and texture, giving it a slightly weathered, industrial look. No internal compartments or trays are visible from the exterior, but the size and design imply a spacious single compartment inside.
description: A rugged, black metal toolbox with a leather handle and a red cross emblem on the lid, suggesting emergency or medical use. The box features metal latches and a weathered, utilitarian finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid black surface, the edge of the lid, and part of the red cross emblem on top.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the full red cross emblem on a white circle, with two metal latches visible on the lid.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the box's depth and the red cross emblem on the lid.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the brown leather handle, two metal brackets, and the main access side for carrying or opening the toolbox.
attribute_handle_type: Single fixed handle made of brown leather, rectangular in shape, attached with metal brackets; designed for carrying and offers a comfortable grip.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Two metal clasp latches on the lid, likely snap-shut type, with no visible keyholes or combination locks.
attribute_compartment_configuration: No internal trays or dividers are visible; the box appears to have a single large internal compartment implied by its size and shape.
attribute_external_labeling: Red cross symbol on a white circle located on the center of the lid.
